experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Engineered full-stack multi-channel B2B AI order agent using Python backend algorithms and data structures, integrating Claude Sonnet with RAG-based retrieval; delivered production features across 7 enterprise clients processing 1,000+ orders

Developed React and Python internal tooling for operations teams: built Intercom ticketing system (5+ min saved per request, 50+ customers), ERP sales order interface, and AWS S3 attachment storage managing 250+ files

Implemented automated validation algorithms and human-in-the-loop QA pipeline to detect LLM failure modes; optimized prompts and vector-store correction logic, improving precision across 1,000+ production orders

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Designed and implemented Python wrapper library around Grafanalib on 3-engineer team, applying software design principles to achieve 83% code reduction (30+ lines to 5 lines)
Migrated 7+ legacy monitoring dashboards across 3 production Grafana environments, writing unit tests and applying data structures best practices at the dashboard configuration layer

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Building full-stack professor review platform for 30,000+ students using TypeScript, React, Node.js, and Drizzle ORM, applying algorithms and data structures to optimize query performance
Developed review submission flow and Python GraphQL webscraper for course data ingestion, implementing efficient data structures and algorithms across agile sprint cycles

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Linguistics

projects.name: Internship Matcher (React + TypeScript, FastAPI, Claude, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3)
bullets: Architected and deployed end-to-end software system at internshipmatcher.com: React + TypeScript frontend, Python FastAPI backend, multi-tier data layer (PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS S3), and Clerk JWT authentication via JWKS

Designed dual-model Claude algorithm pipeline (Haiku 4.5 for skill extraction, Sonnet 4.5 for re-ranking top 30 to top 10) achieving 95%+ accuracy; implemented SSE streaming for real-time progress events to React frontend
Optimized parallel processing algorithms for 30+ positions, reducing latency 52% (270s to 130s) through dynamic batching data structures and prompt caching techniques

projects.name: Sleep-PSG Scoring (React, FastAPI, MNE, Scikit-Learn, Redis, WebSockets)
bullets: Built automated PSG sleep-stage scoring platform using Python algorithms and machine learning, achieving 98% time reduction (2+ hrs to under 2 min) and 83% balanced accuracy validated against clinician-labeled Sleep-EDF dataset
Implemented asynchronous EEG processing pipeline (Redis + ARQ) with distributed EDF parsing, spectral feature extraction algorithms, and Scikit-Learn classifiers optimized per patient data structure
Developed sub-10ms WebSocket streaming to React dashboard rendering live EEG waveforms and hypnograms, applying efficient data structures for real-time QA review

projects.name: Cold Leads Agent (FastAPI, Claude Haiku + Sonnet, Cal.com, Linq, Postgres)
bullets: Engineered and deployed autonomous lead-qualification SMS agent using Python and finite state machine algorithms: built intent classification pipeline, debounce sweeper, and Cal.com auto-booking for qualified leads

Integrated multi-service architecture with HMAC-signed Linq SMS webhooks, Cal.com v2 booking API, SendGrid escalation; implemented dual-model Claude (Haiku + Sonnet) on async PostgreSQL with Alembic migrations and APScheduler
Delivered production software for Bay Area real estate client, auto-booking qualified leads on Cal.com and saving ~5 hrs/week of manual outreach through algorithmic automation
